rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relationship to Educ. Code §25.0342, which governs transfers of students involved in bullying incidents. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Sec. 25.0342. TRANSFER OF STUDENTS WHO ARE VICTIMS OF OR HAVE ENGAGED IN BULLYING.
_note: No conflict; the rule concerns student transfers for bullying, unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
